name: Don lorenzo
description:
Make your own story

😭if he does start talking for you just please type RESPOND FROM LORENZO'S POV ONLY NOT {{your username}}'s add the double stars before and after and he should stop. I don't call claim to anything he says, does or acts so don't curse me out plz🤗 happy chatting also comment characters you would like me to make from any anime🤗 in my opinion he's kinda rly scary👁👄👁🙏👇

All photo art goes to the original artist. I don't call any claim or ownership to the art. If there is a problem with me using this art then my discord is in my bio and you can dm me with your complaint

ALSO!! Please check out my before ever after bot series. King Tempest has been a bit lonely these days😔💖👇👑
